mission.title: The Missing Ledger
mission.subtitle: A swift investigation for the Eldwyn Guild
mission.summary: A ledger containing guild debts has vanished; clues point to a nearby manor and an inside hand.
mission.primary_objective: Recover the ledger and identify the thief

start_location.name: Eldwyn Guildhall
start_location.description: A drafty meeting hall where the ledger was last seen.

key_locations.name: Merchant Manor
key_locations.description: Opulent mansion with a guarded back entrance.

scenes.title: Ledger Discovery
beats: Witness report of a cloaked figure

failed_outcomes: Guild loses access to merchant loans

hooks.detail: Witness claims a cloaked figure left towards the Merchant Manor.

mission.gm_advice: Push clues slowly; reward roleplay investigations.

text: The guild ledger is missing and Master Harrow is panicking. A cloaked figure was seen near the Merchant Manor. Clue chain: tampered binding → witness testimony → manor back alley. Reward: guild favour and trade access. GM tip: let players drive the investigation pace.
